description_long: This is a modern wooden chair with a geometric, angular design, featuring a high rectangular backrest and two armrests that are supported by diagonal braces. The seat is flat and spacious, made from the same wood as the rest of the structure, and the legs are straight and robust, with a rectangular cross-section. The lower part of the chair includes a horizontal support bar connecting the legs for added stability. The backrest has a solid upper section and an open lower section, giving it a contemporary look. The wood grain is visible throughout, with a warm, reddish-brown finish. The overall construction appears sturdy and suitable for both functional and decorative use in urban environments.
description: A modern, angular wooden chair with a high backrest, armrests, and visible wood grain. The design is geometric and sturdy, with a warm reddish-brown finish.
description_view_0: Side view showing the angular armrest and diagonal support, with the high backrest and rectangular legs visible.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the open seat area, armrests, and the solid upper backrest.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the angular armrest and diagonal support structure.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the solid upper backrest, open lower back, and the robust leg structure.
